title: JermsyBoy's Pets and Peeves
description: This pack is a collection of all "peeves" I have with some of the newer textures, and all the mobs I've revamped
body:
This is a very WIP pack that aims to recreate some of the textures that I have issues with in current versions of the game. This pack is very unfinished and will probably change a lot over time. 

Use the mod [Resource Pack Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to customize the pack!

Requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) for the custom mobs to work.

![Scenery with resource pack enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/884e15518fac977d56484c27e036e047f8e857e9_0.webp)

Join my Discord to give suggestions/report issues! https://discord.gg/Ku478Wt

You may not redistribute the textures/models from this pack without my permission.
